title: mariscus umbellatus var. subcompositus
intro: Mariscus umbellatus var. subcompositus, also known as the lesser club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Mariscus umbellatus var. subcompositus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
